description: C# app that calls JsonConvert.DeserializeObject() from Newtonsoft.Json — the vulnerable function for CVE-2024-21907. Tree-sitter call-graph analysis confirms the vulnerable symbol is reachable.

findings.human_justification: JsonConvert.DeserializeObject() is called in the application code. Tree-sitter confirms the vulnerable Newtonsoft.Json function is reachable from the entry point.
